name: ahsir
description: Multi-agent collaboration via the ahsir scheduler. Adds CLI commands and a skill that lets Codex dispatch sub-tasks to specialist agents running under ahsir.

interface.shortDescription: Dispatch work to local specialist agents through the ahsir CLI.
interface.longDescription: ahsir runs a local scheduler for specialist agents and gives Codex a skill for discovering agents, delegating tasks, preserving context, and creating reusable specialists with the ahsir CLI.
defaultPrompt: Use ahsir to list available agents.
Ask the teacher agent to explain this.
Fan out this review across ahsir agents.
